product.name: Depuley Farmhouse Chandelier for Dining Room: 6-Light Black Industrial Kitchen Island Pendant Light Fixture - Rustic Candle Chandeliers Vintage Modern Hanging Ceiling Lamp for Bedroom Foyer

【Multi-Functional Applicability】Designed with various spaces in mind, this flush mount hanging ceiling light provides suitable lighting for living rooms, dining areas, bedrooms, and offices alike.
